aboutMe:
👨‍💻 Full Stack Developer | MERN Stack Specialist

🚀 I am a Full Stack Developer with over 5+ years of experience building scalable and high-performance web applications using the MERN Stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, and Node.js).

💡 I enjoy creating intuitive and user-friendly interfaces, developing robust backend systems, and solving complex technical challenges that deliver real business value.

⚡ My expertise includes:

🌐 Frontend Development with React.js & Redux
🔧 Backend Development with Node.js & Express.js
🗄️ Database Design with MongoDB
☁️ Cloud Technologies & Deployment
🐳 Docker & Containerization
🔄 CI/CD Pipelines & DevOps Practices
📡 RESTful APIs & System Integration

📚 I am passionate about continuous learning, exploring modern technologies, and staying up to date with industry best practices.

🎯 My goal is to build innovative, scalable, and impactful solutions that create meaningful experiences for users and help businesses grow.
